title: Judgment ordering reimbursement or payment of amounts due co-owner out of proceeds of public sale
doc_html:
Art. 4626. Judgment ordering reimbursement or payment of amounts due co-owner out of proceeds of public sale

            A judgment ordering the public sale of property to effect a partition under the provisions of this Chapter shall order, out of the proceeds of such sale, all of the following:

            (1) The reimbursement to a co-owner of the amount proven to be due the co-owner for the payment of taxes on the property, and the expenses of preservation of the property.

            (2) The payment to a co-owner of the amount proven to be due the co-owner by another co-owner who has received and retained the fruits and revenues of the property.

            Acts 2020, No. 281, §2, eff. June 11, 2020.
doc_text:
Art. 4626.  Judgment ordering reimbursement or payment of amounts due co-owner out of
proceeds of public sale
A judgment ordering the public sale of property to effect a partition under the
provisions of this Chapter shall order, out of the proceeds of such sale, all of the following:
(1)  The reimbursement to a co-owner of the amount proven to be due the co-owner
for the payment of taxes on the property, and the expenses of preservation of the property.
(2)  The payment to a co-owner of the amount proven to be due the co-owner by
another co-owner who has received and retained the fruits and revenues of the property.
Acts 2020, No. 281, §2, eff. June 11, 2020.
